$comment: DB-1 schema descriptor for yengo-search.db — the SQLite search index shipped to the browser via sql.js WASM. Source of truth: backend/puzzle_manager/core/db_builder.py (_SCHEMA_SQL). Last Updated: 2026-03-14
title: yengo-search.db (DB-1) Schema
description: Frontend-facing SQLite search index. Read-only in browser. ~500 KB for 9K puzzles. Generated by db_builder.build_search_db() during the publish stage.

tables.name: puzzles
tables.description: Core puzzle metadata. One row per puzzle. No SGF content stored here.

columns.name: content_hash
columns.description: 16-char lowercase hex. SHA-256(sgf_content)[:16]. Matches GN property and SGF filename.

columns.name: batch
columns.description: 4-digit zero-padded batch directory (e.g. '0001'). Combined with content_hash to reconstruct SGF path: sgf/{batch}/{content_hash}.sgf.

columns.name: level_id
columns.description: Numeric difficulty level ID (sparse range 110–230). Maps to level slug via config/puzzle-levels.json. See docs/concepts/numeric-id-scheme.md.

columns.name: quality
columns.description: Puzzle quality score 0–5. Source: YQ property q field.

columns.name: content_type
columns.description: 1=curated, 2=practice, 3=training. Source: config/content-types.json.

columns.name: cx_depth
columns.description: Solution depth (max path length). Source: YX property d field.

columns.name: cx_refutations
columns.description: Total wrong-path reading nodes. Source: YX property r field.

columns.name: cx_solution_len
columns.description: Correct solution move count. Source: YX property s field.

columns.name: cx_unique_resp
columns.description: Unique first-move response count. Source: YX property u field.

columns.name: ac
columns.description: Analysis completeness: 0=untouched, 1=enriched, 2=ai_solved, 3=verified. Source: YQ property ac field.

columns.name: attrs
columns.description: JSON object for future extensible attributes. Decoded client-side if needed.

tables.name: puzzle_tags
tables.description: Many-to-many relationship: puzzle <-> tags. All numeric IDs for compact wire format.

columns.name: content_hash
columns.description: Foreign key to puzzles.content_hash.

columns.name: tag_id
columns.description: Numeric tag ID (sparse: Objectives 10–28, Tesuji 30–52, Techniques 60–82). Maps to tag slug via config/tags.json. See docs/concepts/numeric-id-scheme.md.

tables.name: puzzle_collections
tables.description: Many-to-many relationship: puzzle <-> collections, with author-curated ordering.

columns.name: content_hash
columns.description: Foreign key to puzzles.content_hash.

columns.name: collection_id
columns.description: Numeric collection ID (sequential 1+). Matches collections.collection_id.

columns.name: sequence_number
columns.description: Author-curated position within the collection. NULL for unsorted collections.

tables.name: collections
tables.description: Collection catalog. One row per published collection.

columns.name: collection_id
columns.description: Sequential numeric ID (1+). Referenced by puzzle_collections.collection_id.

columns.name: slug
columns.description: URL-safe kebab-case identifier (e.g. 'cho-chikun-life-death-elementary'). Matches YL SGF property values.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Human-readable display name.

columns.name: category
columns.description: Collection category for grouping in UI. Source: config/collections.json.

columns.name: puzzle_count
columns.description: Denormalized count of puzzles in this collection. Updated at publish time.

columns.name: attrs
columns.description: JSON object for future extensible collection attributes.

fts.description: FTS5 full-text search index on collection name and slug. Used for collection search in the UI.

companion_file.name: db-version.json
companion_file.description: Written atomically alongside yengo-search.db after each successful publish. Versioning uses YYYYMMDD-{8hex} format where the hex is deterministic: SHA-256(sorted content_hashes)[:8].

fields.name: puzzle_count
fields.description: Total rows in puzzles table at generation time.

fields.name: generated_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the DB was generated.

fields.name: schema_version
fields.description: Integer schema version. Increment when table definitions change incompatibly.

see_also.description: Full architecture narrative, bootstrap sequence, and atomic write pattern.
Level ID (110–230), tag ID, and collection ID number spaces.
Quick reference card with column table and example db-version.json.
